# Feature request

## Description

Please describe the feature you would like to see implemented.
Include as much detail as possible, such as use cases, benefits, and any potential challenges or considerations.

## Additional context

Please provide any additional context or information that may be relevant to the feature request, such as related issues, links to documentation, or examples of similar features in other projects.
Add information about how this is an issue with the current behavior and how the proposed feature would address it.

## Expected behavior

Please describe the expected behavior of the feature, including any specific functionality or outcomes that you would like to see.
